prerequisites.value: Both Improved Unarmed Strike and Improved Grapple or the grab ability, ogre, size Large or larger.

description.value:
**Benefit:** If you start your turn grappling another creature at least two size categories smaller than you, you can put the grappled creature in your mouth as a move action and attempt another grapple combat maneuver check (as though attempting to pin the opponent). If you succeed, you swallow the opponent as if you had the swallow whole

**Special:** ability.
